dict.string: MeetMemo needs access to your microphone to record meeting audio for transcription.
MeetMemo uses on-device speech recognition to transcribe meeting audio. Audio never leaves your device.
This app needs access to capture system audio for transcription.
MeetMemo needs access to Reminders so you can add confirmed meeting tasks to the Reminders app.
MeetMemo needs access to Reminders so you can add confirmed meeting tasks to the Reminders app.
